project.title: Immunoprecipitation results against SmD2
project.projectDescription: We performed immunoprecipitation of SmD2 protein in the HCCLM3 cell line to seek proteins that interact with SmD2 in hepatocellular carcinoma.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: The immunoprecipitated products after elution by glycine (0.1M, pH 2.0) and neutralization by HEPES were analyzed by liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry. MS data were searched against the Swiss-Port database of Homo Sapiens.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The immunoprecipitated products after elution by glycine (0.1M, pH 2.0) and neutralization by HEPES were analyzed by liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry. MS data were searched against the Swiss-Port database of Homo Sapiens.

references.referenceLine: Sun L, Liu Y, Guo X, Cui T, Wu C, Tao J, Cheng C, Chu Q, Ji C, Li X, Guo H, Liang S, Zhou H, Zhou S, Ma K, Zhang N, Wang J, Liu Y, Liu L. Acetylation-dependent regulation of core spliceosome modulates hepatocellular carcinoma cassette exons and sensitivity to PARP inhibitors. Nat Commun. 2024 15(1):5209

Comment[EnrichmentMethod]: The immunoprecipitated products after elution by glycine (0.1 M, pH 2.0) and neutralization by HEPES were analyzed by liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry.
Comment[Separation]: homemade reversed-phase analytical column (25-cm length, 75/100 μm i.d.)
Comment[GradientTime]: over 70 minutes, followed by 14 min and 3 min at different concentrations.
Comment[IonizationType]: capillary source and an electrospray voltage of 1.60 kV.
